entries.name: 1700 Body Layer
entries.purpose: Defines the high-level constitutional identity of the V1700 narrative body.

entries.name: Narrative State Layer
entries.purpose: Defines canonical state objects for series, episodes, scenes, characters, world, reveals, and continuity.

entries.name: Memory Layer
entries.purpose: Stores and retrieves read-only project memory before any automated mutation is allowed.

entries.name: Generation Layer
entries.purpose: Compiles scene and episode intents into surface-safe generation packets.

entries.name: Gate Layer
entries.purpose: Turns reports and evidence into promotion or release decisions.

entries.name: Learning Candidate Layer
entries.purpose: Tracks candidate artifacts and style profiles without enabling training execution.

entries.name: Human Approval Layer
entries.purpose: Controls canon mutation, memory write, learning promotion, and release publish authority.
